field_values.action_summary: Carter receives his spoils of war—weapons, silks, furs, and food—delivered by the retinues of the chieftains he defeated. He organizes these people into a functional unit to manage his new quarters, effectively setting up his command center.
field_values.emotional_beat: From chaos/arrival to organized authority and domestic establishment.
field_values.camera_intent: Montage of goods being brought in (silks, weapons, food); Wide shots of the room filling up; Medium shots of Carter directing subordinates; Establishing shot of overgrown central court with fountains/statuary
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Incremental accumulation of physical items (weapons, silks, furs, food) in the room
Specific inventory count of goods being moved
Changing density of Tharkian retainues within the quarters
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH012_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the transition of Carter from a combatant to a settled commander by documenting the physical accumulation of resources and the organization of Tharkian servants within his new quarters.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- various Tharkian retainues/servants

## Required Environments
- carters_quarters_building (Third-floor room overlooking central court)

## Continuity Constraints
- Incremental accumulation of physical items (weapons, silks, furs, food) in the room.
- Specific inventory count of goods being moved.
- Changing density of Tharkian retainues within the quarters.

## Beat List
- BT001: Establishing the new location and view of the central court.
- BT002: The arrival and accumulation of spoils (silks, weapons, food).
- BT003: Carter organizes the unit into a functional command center.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
